case_title: THURMAN BECKER-HOLMES VS. PARK ISLAND STORAGE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: FILING AND AMENDED CLAIM TO CORRECT THE NAME OF DEFENDANT FROM PARK ISLAND STORAGE TO ISLAND PARK STORAGE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BECKER-HOLMES, THURMAN

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BECKER-HOLMES, THURMAN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BECKER-HOLMES, THURMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ISLAND PARK STORAGE $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,200.00 FILED BY BECKER-HOLMES, THURMAN AS TO DEFENDANT PARK ISLAND STORAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,200.00 FILED BY BECKER-HOLMES, THURMAN AS TO DEFENDANT ISLAND PARK STORAGE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED OCT-06-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PARK ISLAND STORAGE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY BECKER-HOLMES, THURMAN ISLAND PARK STORAGE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ISLAND PARK STORAGE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-22-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-22-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE OF AMENDED CLAIM ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAITIFF THURMAN BECKER-HOLMES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ISLAND PARK STORAGE IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL WHITE, MANAGER. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
